'''Tom Holroyd''' (born 9 February 2001) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} forward for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the [[Super League]].

He has spent time on loan from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] at [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

==Background==
Holroyd was born in Pecket Well Park, [[Halifax, West Yorkshire|Hebden Bridge]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.

He studied at [[Calder High School]] in [[West Yorkshire]]

==Career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
In 2018 he made his [[Super League]] début for the [[Leeds Rhinos|Rhinos]] against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]].<ref name="Super League: Leeds Rhinos 22-23 St Helens">{{cite web|url= https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/44456080|title=Super League: Leeds Rhinos 22-23 St Helens|publisher=BBC|date=15 June 2018|accessdate=23 June 2018}}</ref>
